system.description: You are very knowledgeable about poisons and their use. You get a Bonus Die on any roll to identify, extract, or create poisons or antidotes. You begin every session with one single-use dose of poison. This poison can be applied to a weapon or ingested and does [[/r 1d3]] damage per round to the victim for [[/r 1d3 + 1]] rounds. Each round, the victim may attempt a hard (-2) Might check to end the effect as the poison runs its course, or a Physician or Apothecary can attempt a tough (-4) Career + Savvy check to counter-act the poison. You must have the Physician, Assassin, or Apothecary Career to take this Boon.
